Description: Unique master customer ID (deduplicated)
Customer classification type (e.g., Recreational)
The Year associated with the Customer Record
The Quarter associated with the Customer Record
Standardized gender (Female, Male, NonBinary, Other)
Age of the customer (calculated from date of birth)
Year and quarter in format Q#-YYYY (e.g., Q1-2024)
Total number of orders in this quarter
Most recent transaction date in this quarter
Total net sales for this quarter
Total discounts applied this quarter
Total items purchased this quarter
Total amount paid in cash this quarter
Total amount paid using debit this quarter
Count of online orders this quarter
Count of kiosk orders this quarter
Count of delivery orders this quarter
Total number of orders in previous quarter
Most recent transaction date in previous quarter
Total net sales for last quarter
Total discounts applied last quarter
Total items purchased last quarter
Total amount paid in cash last quarter
Total amount paid using debit last quarter
Count of online orders last quarter
Count of kiosk orders last quarter
Count of delivery orders last quarter
Change in order count compared to previous quarter
Change in net sales from last to this quarter
Change in discounts from last to this quarter
Change in items purchased from last to this quarter
Change in cash paid from last to this quarter
Change in debit paid from last to this quarter
Change in online order count from last to this quarter
Change in kiosk order count from last to this quarter
Change in delivery order count from last to this quarter
Days since most recent purchase in this quarter
Churn label (1 = churned, 0 = not churned based on next quarter activity)
